# Satyam Rai — Microsoft Copilot Studio Consultant & AI Agent Developer

> Satyam Rai is a Microsoft Copilot Studio Consultant and AI Agent Developer based in Gurugram, India, with 5+ years of experience building enterprise AI chatbots, virtual agents, and automation solutions using Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, and Power Platform. He is open to freelance projects and remote work globally.

## Identity

- **Full Name:** Satyam Rai

## Core Skills

### AI & Agent Development
- Microsoft Copilot Studio (Expert — 5+ years)
- Azure AI Foundry & Azure OpenAI Service
- LangChain, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines
- Prompt Engineering for enterprise LLMs
- AI chatbot design and deployment (Microsoft Teams, web)

### RPA & Automation
- Power Automate — Desktop and Cloud flows (Expert)
- UI automation, API automation, attended & unattended RPA
- End-to-end process automation for enterprise workflows

### Power Platform
- Power Apps (canvas and model-driven)
- Power Automate, Power BI
- Microsoft Dataverse, SharePoint integration

### Python & Data Engineering
- FastAPI, Pandas, NumPy
- Selenium, Playwright, BeautifulSoup (web scraping)
- Data pipelines, REST API integration

### Cloud & Enterprise
- Microsoft Azure, Azure AI Services
- Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Teams
- REST APIs, Webhooks, JSON

## Services Offered

1. Custom AI Agent and chatbot development using Microsoft Copilot Studio
2. RPA workflow automation using Power Automate (Desktop + Cloud)
3. Enterprise AI integration with Azure AI Foundry and Azure OpenAI
4. Power Apps development (canvas and model-driven apps)
5. Web scraping and intelligent data extraction pipelines
6. End-to-end automation consulting and digital transformation

## Key Projects

### Intelligent Customer Service Copilot
Built an AI-powered customer service chatbot using Microsoft Copilot Studio integrated with Azure OpenAI. Reduced inbound support queries by 40% and improved response time by 65%.

### Enterprise RPA Automation Suite
Automated 15+ manual business processes using Power Automate (Desktop + Cloud flows). Saved 60%+ manual effort and eliminated data entry errors across HR, Finance, and Operations.

### Web Intelligence Platform
Designed a Python-based web scraping and data extraction platform using Selenium, Playwright, and BeautifulSoup. Achieved 95%+ data accuracy across 10+ data sources.

### AI Document Processing System
Built an automated document processing pipeline using Azure AI Form Recognizer and Power Automate. Reduced document processing time from hours to minutes.

### Power Apps Field Operations App
Developed a Microsoft Power Apps canvas application for field operations management, integrated with SharePoint and Dataverse, used by 200+ employees.

## Experience Summary

- **5+ years** of professional experience in AI and automation
- Currently working at **Hollister Incorporated** as an AI/RPA Developer
- Delivered solutions for enterprise clients in manufacturing, healthcare, and finance
- Proven track record of reducing manual effort by 60%+ with automation
